settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your app preferences and geocaching settings

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose your preferred theme and visual style
appearance.themeDescription: Adventure theme uses warm parchment colors perfect for geocaching. System follows your device settings.

relay.title: Relay Configuration
relay.description: Select the Nostr relay for geocaching data. Used for reading and publishing geocaches and logs.

wot.title: Web of Trust Filter
wot.description: Filter geocache listings and logs based on your social network to reduce spam.

descriptions.strict: Strict: Only show content from people you directly follow.
descriptions.normal: Normal: Include content from people your follows follow (recommended).
descriptions.lax: Lax: Include content from two degrees of separation.
descriptions.all: All: Show content from everyone (filter disabled).

wot.laxWarning: Lax mode may be slow to calculate depending on the following count.
wot.followLimitDescription: Ignore users with more than this many follows.
wot.startingUserDescription: The center of your trust network. Use a valid public key, or your own by default.
wot.startingUserPlaceholder: Enter a valid pubkey (npub or hex)
